lat.description: WGS84 latitude of the frame position in decimal degrees.

lon.description: WGS84 longitude of the frame position in decimal degrees.

distance_from_start.description: Cumulative distance along the route from frame 0, in metres.

building_ratio.description: Combined building pixel area as a fraction of total frame area. Derived from semantic segmentation. Range [0, 1].

sky_ratio.description: Sky pixel area as a fraction of total frame area. Indicates vertical openness of the urban profile. Range [0, 1].
sky_ratio.note: Frame 6 records sky_ratio = 0.000 — the only fully enclosed visual field in the dataset (urban canyon).

vegetation_ratio.description: Vegetation pixel area (trees, grass, shrubs) as a fraction of total frame area. Range [0, 1].

building_left.description: Building pixel area in the left half of the frame, as a fraction of the full frame area. Used for stereo spatial audio panning (left channel). Range [0, 1].

building_right.description: Building pixel area in the right half of the frame, as a fraction of the full frame area. Used for stereo spatial audio panning (right channel). Range [0, 1].

person_count.description: Number of persons detected in the frame via object detection. Normalised to 10 for audio amplitude mapping.

vehicle_count.description: Number of vehicles (cars, buses, motorcycles) detected in the frame. Normalised to 8 for audio amplitude mapping.
